title: Layout Workers, Metal and Plastic
description: Lay out reference points and dimensions on metal or plastic stock or workpieces, such as sheets, plates, tubes, structural shapes, castings, or machine parts, for further processing. Includes shipfitters.

tasks.text: Mark curves, lines, holes, dimensions, and welding symbols onto workpieces, using scribes, soapstones, punches, and hand drills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan locations and sequences of cutting, drilling, bending, rolling, punching, and welding operations, using compasses, protractors, dividers, and rules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fit and align fabricated parts to be welded or assembled.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate center lines and verify template positions, using measuring instruments such as gauge blocks, height gauges, and dial indicators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and develop layouts from blueprints and templates, applying knowledge of trigonometry, design, effects of heat, and properties of metals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lay out and fabricate metal structural parts such as plates, bulkheads, and frames.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute layout dimensions, and determine and mark reference points on metal stock or workpieces for further processing, such as welding and assembly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lift and position workpieces in relation to surface plates, manually or with hoists, and using parallel blocks and angle plates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design and prepare templates of wood, paper, or metal.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install doors, hatches, brackets, and clips.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Brace parts in position within hulls or ships for riveting or welding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect machined parts to verify conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Add dimensional details to blueprints or drawings made by other workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply pigment to layout surfaces, using paint brushes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
